productDisplayName: Scullers Unisex Casual Muffler Black Mufflers
description: Celebrate the start of winter with this trendy scullers muffler. Wrap it around your neck and let it hang loose on a windy day or simply tuck it into your coat on a wintery day. Made of 100% acrylicHas black and white stripes with a ribbed hemBrand label on the hemWash careWash separately in cold water with mild detergentDo not bleachDry flat in shade and do not hang
